'''wodashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:bytesexual|bytesexual]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-d-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bytesexual|bytesexual]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wodashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodashithi|wodashithi]] || [[word:wodashiji|wodashiji]] || [[word:wodashishi|wodashishi]] || [[word:wodashiki|wodashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodashuthuthu|wodashuthuthu]] || [[word:wodashujuju|wodashujuju]] || [[word:wodashushushu|wodashushushu]] || [[word:wodashukuku|wodashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodashuthu|wodashuthu]] || [[word:wodashuju|wodashuju]] || [[word:wodashushu|wodashushu]] || [[word:wodashuku|wodashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodashufthuf|wodashufthuf]] || [[word:wodashufjuf|wodashufjuf]] || [[word:wodashufshuf|wodashufshuf]] || [[word:wodashufkuf|wodashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodashethe|wodashethe]] || [[word:wodasheje|wodasheje]] || [[word:wodasheshe|wodasheshe]] || [[word:wodasheke|wodasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodashothotho|wodashothotho]] || [[word:wodashojojo|wodashojojo]] || [[word:wodashoshosho|wodashoshosho]] || [[word:wodashokoko|wodashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodashotho|wodashotho]] || [[word:wodashojo|wodashojo]] || [[word:wodashosho|wodashosho]] || [[word:wodashoko|wodashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodashofthof|wodashofthof]] || [[word:wodashofjof|wodashofjof]] || [[word:wodashofshof|wodashofshof]] || [[word:wodashofkof|wodashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodashïfthïf|wodashïfthïf]] || [[word:wodashïfjïf|wodashïfjïf]] || [[word:wodashïfshïf|wodashïfshïf]] || [[word:wodashïfkïf|wodashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodashïfthïfthïf|wodashïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:wodashïfjïfjïf|wodashïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:wodashïfshïfshïf|wodashïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:wodashïfkïfkïf|wodashïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodashïfthïf|wodashïfthïf]] || [[word:wodashïfjïf|wodashïfjïf]] || [[word:wodashïfshïf|wodashïfshïf]] || [[word:wodashïfkïf|wodashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodashïfthïf|wodashïfthïf]] || [[word:wodashïfjïf|wodashïfjïf]] || [[word:wodashïfshïf|wodashïfshïf]] || [[word:wodashïfkïf|wodashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodashæthæ|wodashæthæ]] || [[word:wodashæjæ|wodashæjæ]] || [[word:wodashæshæ|wodashæshæ]] || [[word:wodashækæ|wodashækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodashathatha|wodashathatha]] || [[word:wodashajaja|wodashajaja]] || [[word:wodashashasha|wodashashasha]] || [[word:wodashakaka|wodashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodashatha|wodashatha]] || [[word:wodashaja|wodashaja]] || [[word:wodashasha|wodashasha]] || [[word:wodashaka|wodashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodashafthaf|wodashafthaf]] || [[word:wodashafjaf|wodashafjaf]] || [[word:wodashafshaf|wodashafshaf]] || [[word:wodashafkaf|wodashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wodashasha|wodashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wodashësha|wodashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wodashrosha|wodashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wodashmusha|wodashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wodashyasha|wodashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowodashnkshësha|gowodashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowodashnkrosha|gowodashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowodashnkmusha|gowodashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowodashnkyasha|gowodashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wodadashasha|wodadashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wodadashësha|wodadashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wodadashrosha|wodadashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wodadashmusha|wodadashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wodadashyasha|wodadashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowodadashnkshësha|gowodadashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowodadashnkrosha|gowodadashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowodadashnkmusha|gowodadashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowodadashnkyasha|gowodadashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wedæshasha|wedæshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wedæshësha|wedæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wedæshrosha|wedæshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wedæshmusha|wedæshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wedæshyasha|wedæshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowedæshnkshësha|gowedæshnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowedæshnkrosha|gowedæshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowedæshnkmusha|gowedæshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowedæshnkyasha|gowedæshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wodfashasha|wodfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wodfashësha|wodfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wodfashrosha|wodfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wodfashmusha|wodfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wodfashyasha|wodfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowodfashnkshësha|gowodfashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowodfashnkrosha|gowodfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowodfashnkmusha|gowodfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowodfashnkyasha|gowodfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
